case_title: JOHNSON, LEAH RENE et al VS DANG, TRIET MINH DBA NEW YORK HAIR AND NAIL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-05-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-17-2006 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, TRIET MINH DBA NEW YORK HAIR AND NAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, LEAH RENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANG, TRIET MINH DBA NEW YORK HAIR AND NAIL $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,080.00, PLAINTIFF MILTON BRUCE JOHNSON DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE-NO STANDING TO SUE. THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF LEAH RENE JOHNSON'S DAMAGES TO BE $4000, AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,629.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, LEAH RENE JOHNSON, MILTON BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT DANG, TRIET MINH DBA NEW YORK HAIR AND NAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
